ref: They were able to see, and Jesus strictly warned them not to tell anyone about him.

ref: After Jesus had been arrested, he was led off to the house of Caiaphas the high priest. The nation's leaders and the teachers of the Law of Moses were meeting there.

ref: I say if your wife has not committed some terrible sexual sin, you must not divorce her to marry someone else. If you do, you are unfaithful.‚Äù
text: Jeha n…õ …î i ng…õ ny…õ dee ke: N…î tsuaa n…î n…õ pi ajuama b…îmi he je n…õ e maa fie e yo n…õ e ma ya ng…î yo kpa a, e pu…õ gba; n…õ n…î tsuaa n…î n…õ ng…î…î yo n…õ a fie l…õ …î, l…õ hu e pu…õ gba.‚Äù
translated: ‚ÄúThe chief said that if the stranger came to his house and he gave him food and drink and the stranger insulted him, he would beat him; that if the stranger came to his house and he insulted him, he would beat him.‚Äù

ref: John wore clothes made of camel's hair. He had a leather strap around his waist and ate grasshoppers and wild honey.
text: Se Yohane …î afukp…îng…î he bw…îmi a k…õ lo e tade …î, n…õ lohwe he womi kpa fi e ml…õ mi, n…õ e ni yeni ji baal…õ k…õ nga n…î hwo.
translated: The Gospel of John is the good news that God gave to us, it tells us that God loves us and that He gave His only Son for our salvation.

ref: Jesus told the man to stand up where everyone could see him.

ref: and said, ‚ÄúI have sinned by betraying a man who has never done anything wrong.‚Äù ‚ÄúSo what? That's your problem,‚Äù they replied.

translated: He was a great warrior, people feared him, and when he went out, people would run away, and if anyone stood his ground, he would beat them up.

ref: Jesus had gone into the temple and was teaching when the chief priests and the leaders of the people came up to him. They asked, ‚ÄúWhat right do you have to do these things? Who gave you this authority?‚Äù

translated: The people brought Jesus to the chief priest, and all the chief priests and elders and teachers of the law came together. The chief priests and elders asked Jesus: ‚ÄúAre you the Messiah, the Son of the Blessed One? Are you the one we have been looking for, or should we wait for another?‚Äù

ref: About that time Jesus came from Nazareth in Galilee, and John baptized him in the Jordan River.

ref: Don't be afraid of people. They can kill you, but they cannot harm your soul. Instead, you should fear God who can destroy both your body and your soul in hell.
text: N…õ ny…õ ko ye nin…õm…õ n…õ gbee n…îml…î tso …î n…õ a ny…õ we klaa a n…õ a gbe …î gbeye; se mohu ny…õ…õ ye n…î n…õ ny…õ…õ klaa a k…õ n…îml…î tso …î tsuo h…õ mi kpataa ng…õ gehena mi …î gbeye.
translated: If you want to eat the food and you don't have money, you should go and farm; if you farm and you don't have seeds, you should go and look for seeds to farm.
